title: calamintha officinalis f. boveana
intro: Calamintha officinalis f. boveana, also known as mountain mint, is a variety of the Calamintha officinalis plant, which is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which help to soothe digestive issues, relieve headaches, and ease respiratory problems. The health benefits of Calamintha officinalis f. boveana include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and provide relief from menstrual cramps and other women's health issues. Calamintha officinalis f. boveana is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
